name: TCIL_GetDesignator
title: TCIL_GetDesignator
syntax: long TCIL_GetDesignator(dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, dword unitDesignatorBufferSize, char unitDesignatorBuffer[]); // form 1: deprecated with 13
long TCIL_GetDesignator(dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, char unitDesignatorBuffer[]); // form 2
long TCIL_GetDesignator(dword addresClient, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, char unitDesignatorBuffer[]); // form 3
long TCIL_GetDesignator(dbNode tc, dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, dword unitDesignatorBufferSize, char unitDesignatorBuffer[]); // form 4: deprecated with 13
long TCIL_GetDesignator(dbNode tc, dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, char unitDesignatorBuffer[]); // form 5
long TCIL_GetDesignator(dbNode tc, dword addresClient, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, char unitDesignatorBuffer[]); // form 6
description: Returns the designator of DeviceProcessData (DPD) or DeviceProperty (DPT) object defined by DDI/elementNumber.
Form 5 and 6 applicable in test module / test unit only.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: TC simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: TC client node the data entity belongs to.

parameters.name: addressClient
parameters.description: TC client node the data entity belongs to.

parameters.name: unitDesignatorBuffer
parameters.description: Return buffer. Contains the designator as a string.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
